_meta.author: isaiahbjork
_meta.title: Leads Data Table
_meta.description: This leads table component displays sales prospects with comprehensive data visualization including deal sizes, source tracking, status indicators, interest trend sparklines, and probability scoring. It features smooth micro-interactions like hover-triggered action buttons, row selection with bulk operations, and a sliding bottom action bar that appears when leads are selected. The component is ideal for CRM dashboards, sales management interfaces, and lead tracking systems where users need to quickly assess and act on potential business opportunities.
